scope: Finish the first-class Ollama local provider surface for native SDK chat, streaming, health checks, local endpoint defaults, and model routing

rows.source: Ollama local provider profile and discovery anchors
requiredBehaviors: keep the canonical Ollama provider implementation under runtime/src/llm/providers/ollama
export OllamaProvider and OllamaProviderConfig from the provider namespace
preserve compatibility exports from the historical runtime/src/llm/ollama entrypoint
route provider factory creation to the canonical provider namespace
edgeCases: moved adapter/type files are not duplicated under the historical directory
commands: npm run test --workspace=@tetsuo-ai/runtime -- src/llm/providers/ollama/provider.test.ts src/llm/provider.test.ts src/llm/provider-parity.test.ts

rows.source: Ollama provider profile, local endpoint discovery, and model recommendation anchors
requiredBehaviors: send native Ollama SDK chat requests
serialize system prompts and user messages into Ollama message format
map max output tokens and context window settings into Ollama options

rows.source: Ollama local generation readiness and health-check anchors
requiredBehaviors: stream native Ollama SDK chunks through the provider callback
emit final streaming usage from Ollama prompt and completion counters
probe local model list for health checks
abort long-running streams when the local Ollama health sidecar reports provider loss
treat ECONNREFUSED from the local endpoint as provider loss

rows.source: Ollama provider profile defaults and local model discovery anchors
requiredBehaviors: honor OLLAMA_MODEL and explicit factory model overrides
normalize OLLAMA_BASE_URL by stripping a trailing /v1 suffix
advertise llama3.3 as the documented AgenC default Ollama route
list Ollama through runtime model metadata and manager surfaces
keep Ollama local API-key resolution unset
edgeCases: OPENAI globals do not leak into Ollama routing
runtime _deps catalog mirrors the config catalog
commands: npm run test --workspace=@tetsuo-ai/runtime -- src/llm/provider.test.ts src/config/config.test.ts src/llm/models-manager.test.ts
